It has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, offering relief from various ailments, including digestive issues, fever, and inflammatory conditions, due to its health benefits. The bioactive constituents of Acetosa (Oxalis) radiata include flavonoids, anthocyanins, and oxalates, which contribute to its medicinal properties.
